final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand poster for "RAN QIU".

Style/medium: needs an Oriental minimalist aesthetic with natural poetic sensibility — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the brand wordmark "RAN QIU"
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs golden hour warmth with shallow depth of field — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown)
Materials/textures: needs a warm, healing surface treatment — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve warm and tranquil visual experience, maintain brand poetic tone
Avoid:
